'''dosawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweaked|tweaked]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweaked|tweaked]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dosawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosawithi|dosawithi]] || [[word:dosawiji|dosawiji]] || [[word:dosawishi|dosawishi]] || [[word:dosawiki|dosawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosawuthuthu|dosawuthuthu]] || [[word:dosawujuju|dosawujuju]] || [[word:dosawushushu|dosawushushu]] || [[word:dosawukuku|dosawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosawuthu|dosawuthu]] || [[word:dosawuju|dosawuju]] || [[word:dosawushu|dosawushu]] || [[word:dosawuku|dosawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosawufthuf|dosawufthuf]] || [[word:dosawufjuf|dosawufjuf]] || [[word:dosawufshuf|dosawufshuf]] || [[word:dosawufkuf|dosawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosawethe|dosawethe]] || [[word:dosaweje|dosaweje]] || [[word:dosaweshe|dosaweshe]] || [[word:dosaweke|dosaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosawothotho|dosawothotho]] || [[word:dosawojojo|dosawojojo]] || [[word:dosawoshosho|dosawoshosho]] || [[word:dosawokoko|dosawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosawotho|dosawotho]] || [[word:dosawojo|dosawojo]] || [[word:dosawosho|dosawosho]] || [[word:dosawoko|dosawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosawofthof|dosawofthof]] || [[word:dosawofjof|dosawofjof]] || [[word:dosawofshof|dosawofshof]] || [[word:dosawofkof|dosawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfthÃŸf|dosawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfjÃŸf|dosawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfshÃŸf|dosawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfkÃŸf|dosawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dosawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dosawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dosawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dosawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfthÃŸf|dosawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfjÃŸf|dosawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfshÃŸf|dosawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfkÃŸf|dosawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfthÃŸf|dosawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfjÃŸf|dosawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfshÃŸf|dosawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dosawÃŸfkÃŸf|dosawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dosawÃḊthÃḊ|dosawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dosawÃḊjÃḊ|dosawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dosawÃḊshÃḊ|dosawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dosawÃḊkÃḊ|dosawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dosawathatha|dosawathatha]] || [[word:dosawajaja|dosawajaja]] || [[word:dosawashasha|dosawashasha]] || [[word:dosawakaka|dosawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dosawatha|dosawatha]] || [[word:dosawaja|dosawaja]] || [[word:dosawasha|dosawasha]] || [[word:dosawaka|dosawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dosawafthaf|dosawafthaf]] || [[word:dosawafjaf|dosawafjaf]] || [[word:dosawafshaf|dosawafshaf]] || [[word:dosawafkaf|dosawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dosawasha|dosawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosawshÃḋsha|dosawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosawrosha|dosawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosawmusha|dosawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosawyasha|dosawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosawnkshÃḋsha|godosawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosawnkrosha|godosawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosawnkmusha|godosawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosawnkyasha|godosawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dosasawasha|dosasawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosasawshÃḋsha|dosasawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosasawrosha|dosasawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosasawmusha|dosasawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosasawyasha|dosasawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosasawnkshÃḋsha|godosasawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosasawnkrosha|godosasawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosasawnkmusha|godosasawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosasawnkyasha|godosasawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:desÃḊwasha|desÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:desÃḊwshÃḋsha|desÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:desÃḊwrosha|desÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:desÃḊwmusha|desÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:desÃḊwyasha|desÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godesÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|godesÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godesÃḊwnkrosha|godesÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godesÃḊwnkmusha|godesÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godesÃḊwnkyasha|godesÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dosfawasha|dosfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dosfawshÃḋsha|dosfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dosfawrosha|dosfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dosfawmusha|dosfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dosfawyasha|dosfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godosfawnkshÃḋsha|godosfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godosfawnkrosha|godosfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godosfawnkmusha|godosfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godosfawnkyasha|godosfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
